dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6076 IH: Save Our Seas 2.0 Marine Debris Infrastructure Programs Reauthorization Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Bonamici (for herself and Mr. Carter of Georgia) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure

form.official-title: To amend the Save Our Seas 2.0 Act to reauthorize certain Environmental Protection Agency programs, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Save Our Seas 2.0 Marine Debris Infrastructure Programs Reauthorization Act.

section.header: Reauthorization of EPA programs to combat plastic waste
section.text: Section 302(g) of the Save Our Seas 2.0 Act (33 U.S.C. 4282(g)) is amended, in each of paragraphs (1) and (2)—

paragraph.text: by inserting in after described; and
